title: Narrative Profile — Relationship
description: Profile overlay schema constraining relationship.interpretations for the narrative profile.

dynamic_at_start.description: Relational dynamic when the story begins.

dynamic_at_end.description: Relational dynamic at the story's end (or last observed point).

power_balance.description: Who holds structural power in the relationship.

trust.description: Trust level between the two parties.

stability.description: How stable or volatile the relationship is.
